programmes.title: The Ministry of Ungentlemanly Warfare
programmes.description: A top secret combat unit of rogues and mavericks goes on a daring mission against the Nazis, ultimately changing the course of WWII and laying the foundation of modern black ops. Henry Cavill, Eiza Gonzalez. The top secret combat unit, composed of a motley crew of rogues and mavericks led by Gus March-Phillipps (Henry Cavill), goes on a daring mission against the Nazis using entirely unconventional and utterly "ungentlemanly" fighting techniques. Ultimately, the task force's audacious approach changed the course of the war and laid the foundation for the British SAS and modern black ops warfare.

programmes.title: Tootsie
programmes.description: Wanneer de temperamentvolle acteur Michael geen nieuwe rollen meer krijgt, besluit hij een drastische stap te zetten. Hij verkleedt zich als vrouw en treedt op onder het pseudoniem van Dorothy Michaels. Dorothy krijgt meteen een hoofdrol in een succesvolle serie. Maar gaandeweg komt Michael in de problemen. Hij heeft immers een oogje op zijn knappe tegenspeelster die niets afweet van zijn dubbelrol.

programmes.title: Blade Runner
programmes.description: In the smog-choked dystopian Los Angeles of 2019, blade runner Rick Deckard is called out of retirement to terminate a quartet of replicants who have escaped to Earth seeking their creator for a way to extend their short life spans. Special police brigades, the Blade Runners, had orders to kill all those who had not complied with the sentence. But this was not called execution, it was called "retirement." After a serious incident, former Blade Runner Rick Deckard is called back into service to find and "retire" some rogue Replicants.
